headline: Should You Buy Warner Bros. Discovery (WBD)?
summary: Warner Bros. Discovery, Inc. (NASDAQ:WBD) is one of the 13 Best Stocks to Invest In According to Billionaire Ken Griffin. Media and entertainment giant Warner Bros. Discovery, Inc. (NASDAQ:WBD) has been in the news for months due to Paramount Skydance’s acquisition attempt. Its shares are up by 177% over the past year and down by […]
